# SellonTube

> SellonTube is a YouTube growth platform for B2B businesses. We provide free tools and educational content that help B2B companies use YouTube as a customer acquisition channel.

## What SellonTube Does

SellonTube helps B2B companies turn YouTube into a predictable customer acquisition channel. Our free tools audit video SEO, generate buyer-intent video ideas, evaluate topic viability, extract transcripts, and calculate YouTube ROI. Our blog and guides cover YouTube SEO, marketing strategy, and channel growth specifically for businesses that sell to other businesses.

Our approach: identify high-intent search queries on YouTube, create videos that answer those queries, and convert viewers into qualified leads. YouTube videos compound over time, generating leads months and years after publishing.

## Who SellonTube Is For

- B2B founders and SaaS companies evaluating YouTube for customer acquisition
- Coaching, consulting, and agency businesses with high customer lifetime value
- Course creators and info product businesses
- Any business where prospects research before buying

## Free YouTube Tools

- YouTube SEO Tool: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-seo-tool - Audit your video's buyer-intent SEO across 5 dimensions with exact rewrite suggestions
- YouTube Video Ideas Generator: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-video-ideas-generator - Get buyer-intent video ideas based on your product, target customer, and problem
- YouTube Video Idea Evaluator: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-video-ideas-evaluator - Score whether a video idea attracts buyers or just viewers
- YouTube Transcript Generator: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-transcript-generator - Extract clean transcripts from any YouTube video
- YouTube ROI Calculator: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-roi-calculator - Calculate if YouTube makes financial sense for your business
